# CWE-90 positive: LDAP filter built via string concat (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-90-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

// CWE-90 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query
// Vulnerable line: mail attribute embedded directly into filter string.
func QueryLDAP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, dial func(string) error) {
	mail := r.URL.Query().Get("mail")
	filter := fmt.Sprintf("(&(objectClass=person)(mail=%s))", mail)
	if err := dial(filter); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "ldap", http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
}
